pages.raw_text:
NOTICE OF SPECIAL NETTING


To the stockholders of the Ger
manAmerican Mining Co.: You and
each of you are hereby notified that
the stockholders of the German
American Mining Co. at the office
of the company, 800 Columbia
building. Spokane, Wash, at II
o'clock in the forenoon on the 5th
day of May, 1910. for the purpose
of considering the matter of trans
ferring the mining claims Of this
company in the state of Idaho, and
for the purpose of transferring said
property to the United Lead Mines
company; also for the purpose of
considering the matter of disincor-
porating and winding up the affairs
of the German American Mining Co.


Dated at Spokane, Wasn., this sew
enth day Of March, 1910. German
American Mining Co, by c. e. Nit
chell secretary.
